headline: Kroger: The Business Is Improving, But The Earnings Outlook Is Still Murky
summary: The Kroger Co. is rated a Hold, as improving traffic and market share are offset by uncertain earnings leverage. Read more on KR stock here.

headline: Kroger Offers the Cheapest Store-Brand Grocery Basket Among Four Major Chains, Study Finds
summary: Kroger topped Walmart and Aldi in a new grocery price comparison as food costs continue to pressure household budgets.
